mapper.sql: id, question, options_json, sort_order, active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE quick_quiz_questions SET active = 0, updated_at = strftime('%s','now') * 1000
mapper.select: SELECT FROM quick_quiz_questions WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.question_id, r.player_key, r.username, r.choice_index, r.choice_text, r.created_at, q.question, q.options_json FROM quick_quiz_records r JOIN quick_quiz_questions q ON q.id = r.question_id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM quick_quiz_records mine WHERE mine.room_id = r.room_id AND mine.question_id = r.question_id AND mine.player_key = #{playerKey} ) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.question_id, r.player_key, r.username, r.choice_index, r.choice_text, r.created_at, q.question, q.options_json FROM quick_quiz_records r JOIN quick_quiz_questions q ON q.id = r.question_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id ASC
